title: Resources & Support
subtitle: Essential resources, community support, and official information for passengers and crew during the Air Canada flight attendant strike.
noResults: No resources found matching your search.

essential.title: Essential Resources
essential.description: Quick access to the most important resources for immediate help and official information.

mutualAid.name: Passenger & Crew Mutual Aid Spreadsheet
mutualAid.description: Crowdsourced support offering meals, emergency contacts, and mutual aid for Air Canada employees and passengers during the strike.

mainMegathread.name: AC FA Strike Aug 16 Megathread (Reddit)
mainMegathread.description: Main community help and FAQ hub for Air Canada passengers and crew during the strike with real-time updates and support.

acStrikeUpdate.name: Air Canada Official Strike Update Page
acStrikeUpdate.description: Official Air Canada hub for travel advisories, flexible booking policies, and rebooking options during the labour disruption.

acVacations.name: Air Canada Vacations Labour Advisory
acVacations.description: Labour negotiations updates specifically for Air Canada Vacations package bookings and travel arrangements.

compensationWiki.name: Compensation and Delay Wiki (Reddit)
compensationWiki.description: Comprehensive FAQ and wiki on passenger compensation rights, APPR regulations, EU/UK rules, and delay policies.

bindingArbitration.name: Binding Arbitration Megathread (Reddit)
bindingArbitration.description: Community megathread following government intervention with key updates, passenger support, and frequently asked questions.

strikeMandate.name: Strike Mandate Update Megathread (Reddit)
strikeMandate.description: Earlier community thread tracking the union's strike mandate approval and passenger reactions during the buildup.

aug1213.name: Strike Aug 12-13 Megathread (Reddit)
aug1213.description: Community discussion and passenger advice covering events and developments during the August 12-13 period.

aug1415.name: Strike Aug 14-15 Megathread (Reddit)
aug1415.description: Community discussion and passenger advice covering events and developments during the August 14-15 period.

faSalary.name: How much AC flight attendants ACTUALLY get paid (Reddit)
faSalary.description: Community-sourced breakdown of flight attendant T4 earnings, wage analysis, and cost of living commentary.

cupeStatement.description: Official CUPE press release outlining the union's position on forced arbitration, strike legality, and contract negotiations.

ceaseDesist.description: Independent journalism report on Air Canada's legal response to reported wildcat strike and 'sick out' activities.
